title: Senior Project Engineer (APAC) - Automation Instruments
description:
About the Role

The Solutions Senior Project Engineer is responsible for executing engineering and design tasks for customer-specific solutions within the Solution Business Center Asia Pacific (SBC APAC). This role ensures that engineered systems meet customer specifications, industry standards, and quality expectations. Acting as a technical liaison between customers, internal teams, and external partners, the Solutions Sr. Project Engineer plays a critical role in delivering high-quality, customized automation solutions from design through commissioning.

This role will be based in Singapore, is part of the Solution Business Center ( SBC APAC ) and reports to the Engineering Manager.


The main tasks and responsibilities are:

Project Objectives & Delivery

• Deliver projects within defined timeframes and budget.

• Ensure project scope and quality meet customer and internal expectations.


Customer & Stakeholder Liaison

• Engage directly with customer technical teams to align requirements, resolve issues, and co-develop optimal solutions.

• Collaborate with internal stakeholders across SBC, other entities, suppliers, and partners to ensure smooth project execution.

• Validate customer requirements for order processing.


Project Management & Execution

• Execute engineering and design activities in accordance with customer specifications, industry standards, and internal quality guidelines.

• Manage quality assurance processes including Factory Acceptance Testing (FAT), Site Acceptance Testing (SAT), and customer approvals.

• Oversee and support on-site activities such as system installation, construction supervision, and commissioning.

• Provide regular project updates to the Project / Engineering Manager.


Documentation & Data Management

• Maintain and manage all project-related documentation.


Team Leadership

• Lead and mentor project team members as needed.


Customer Satisfaction & Communication

• Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction through clear and proactive communication.

• Liaise with customers and management on production capabilities, schedules, inspections, and issue resolution.


Additional Responsibilities

• Perform other duties as required to support the company’s business strategy.


Key Competencies

• Strong technical expertise in process automation, instrumentation, or systems engineering.

• Ability to interpret and apply customer specifications and industry standards.

• Excellent communication and problem-solving skills for effective collaboration with customers and cross-functional teams.

• Experience in quality control processes, including FAT/SAT.

• Willingness to travel for on-site supervision and commissioning.

• Proactive, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple tasks in a dynamic environment.

• Strong time management and teamwork skills.


Requirements

• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Electrical, Mechanical, Process, or Automation Engineering.

• Minimum 7 years of relevant experience in project engineering or solution delivery, particularly in custody transfer or fiscal metering systems within the Oil & Gas industry.

• Proven track record in project management and familiarity with project management tools.

• Solid understanding of instrumentation and relevant industry standards, codes, and procedures.


Working hours:

Mon to Fri, 8:30am to 5:30pm

Company Overview
